xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:NoteForNonApplicabilityOfTheDi: No default during the quarter ended September 2025
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DisclosureOfNotesOnFinancialRe: Refer detailed Standalone Financials Results for Quarter and Half year ended September 30, 2025 uploaded on the stock exchanges and oin the Bank's website.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DisclosureOfNotesOnAssetsAndLi: Refer detailed Standalone Financials Results for Quarter and Half year ended September 30, 2025 uploaded on the stock exchanges and oin the Bank's website.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DisclosureOfNotesOnSegmentsExp: Refer detailed Standalone Financials Results for Quarter and Half year ended September 30, 2025 uploaded on the stock exchanges and oin the Bank's website.

xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:CommentsOfTheAuditCommitteeAft: The Audit Committee noted that there is no deviation/variation in the use of funds raised through Preferential Issue.
The Audit Committee noted that there is no deviation/variation in the use of funds raised through Preferential Issue.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:OriginalObject: To cater to the short-term and long-term working capital requirements of the Bank, support its future growth plans focusing on the robust business model of Retail Loans and Retail Deposit franchise and be prepared for the uncertainties arising from the macro-economic scenario including the probability of a global recessionary impact induced by the US economy.

To cater to the short-term and long-term working capital requirements of the Bank, support its future growth plans focusing on the robust business model of Retail Loans and Retail Deposit franchise and be prepared for the uncertainties arising from the macro-economic scenario including the probability of a global recessionary impact induced by the US economy.
